results.title: Dave Hyde: Nonsense is over as fans make peace with Inter Miami (but Messi leaves win)
results.description: MIAMI — For those of you waiting patiently for a sign the nonsense was done, there were drummers drumming again and chanters chanting Sunday throughout Inter Miami’s 6-4 win against Philadelphia. That said enough. These select fans were finished holding their breath until they turned blue in the face. But the ultimate sign of peace in our time, that acknowledging wave these fans so coveted ...
